$comment: add_unit: generate ONE unit of a composed system into the active workspace. Reads its spec (from <ws>/specs/<specfile>) + the project so far (read_project, so it uses prior units' real names/signatures), generates the C# file, stages+builds the WHOLE project (the oracle), repairs once, registers it. Called by the compose foreach: $input = '<targetpath> <specfile>'. proj = $workspace.
summary: Generate one composed unit against the accumulated project, build the whole project, repair once, register.
